input.rationale: Low-risk, internal-only 'add_to_routine' action suggesting a free EarlyON drop-in playgroup. No payment, no external communication, and no medical/legal content requiring per-action approval, so the blanket rule against approving medical/legal comms doesn't apply. Idempotency check (only relevant tool for this action type) returned ok:true, confirming this isn't a duplicate within the lookback window. The action is easily reversible (can be removed from the routine list), and there's no recipient, spending, or scheduling risk since nothing is sent externally.
